rationale: The response is not a memo at all. It appears to be a tiny fragment of an internal outline or drafting note—two incomplete bullet points under a 'Conclusion' subheading. None of the prompt requirements (what is affected, what is not, what questions to bring forward) are addressed. There is no usable content to evaluate on any axis.
